programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - I Do, I Dont
programme.desc: Steve refuses to allow Snoop Doggy Dogg and Sean Puffy Combs to use music from the Hi-Tops until they resolve their rivalry.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Cant Buy Me Love
programme.desc: A new student (Kenan Thompson) gives Regina (Wendy Raquel Robinson) an extravagant birthday gift, but Steve (Steve Harvey) pretends it is from him.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - The Kyles Go to Hawaii
programme.desc: Michael discovers the familys flight home from Hawaii leaves much earlier than he thought; Claire tries to hide her costly hotel charges.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Diary of a Mad Teen
programme.desc: Janet learns that Claire is thinking about having sex with her boyfriend; Jr. is an irresponsible driver.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Being Bernie Mac
programme.desc: Bernie must baby-sit for Bryana and deal with Jordan, who was sent home from school for pulling a fire alarm unnecessarily.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Mac Overdrive
programme.desc: Bernie has no patience when trying to teach Vanessa to drive.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Pop Pop Goes the Weasel
programme.desc: When Bryanas father, Bryan, visits, he threatens Bernies relationship with Jordan and undermines Bernies barbecuing techniques.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Prison Break
programme.desc: Bernie realizes his punishment system is no longer effective, so he puts the kids into a total lockdown.

programme.title: Cindy Crawford talks about the latest breakthroughs in skincare
programme.desc: Join Cindy Crawford as she talks to real customers about the breakthrough skincare system that keeps them looking their best. Take a trip to the stunning French countryside to see the rare French melon that defies the aging process.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn whats behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQs Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Risk-Free Hearing Aid!
programme.desc: Call today to try the high quality, low-price Audien hearing aid, risk-free! No doctor or fittings necessary.

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote And installation.

programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block - Accepting Me
programme.desc: Self-love is the first step in finding self-acceptance.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Whole Chicken and Fennel
programme.desc: Chef Don goes toe to toe with Chef Al; todays challenge focuses on the components of whole chicken paired with fennel; the pitmasters must artfully integrate Flo wine into their dish.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Sausage and Tomato
programme.desc: Chef Jazzuri and Chef Stanzee throw down in the semifinal match; sausage and tomato are on the menu today, but the contestants must also integrate blackberry Merlot jam into their dishes.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Pork Belly and Rice
programme.desc: The first round of the finals has arrived; Chef Stanzee faces off against Chef Al; the challenge is cooking up pork belly with a side of rice.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Vegan BBQ and Mango
programme.desc: Stanzee and Al look to seal their win and leave it all out in the arena; vegan BBQ with a side of mango is on the menu.

programme.title: The Forgettable Life of Liam White
programme.desc: An uninspired novelist begins a journey of self-reflection and reconciliation when he learns that his cancer has returned.

programme.title: The First Class
programme.desc: A look at students and educators at Memphis High School reveals the impact of a city reimagining education together.

programme.title: Family Time - Forbidden Fruits
programme.desc: Tony gets a new client, who happens to be a very attractive woman; Lisa and Tony are struggling to complete a ten-day all juice diet.

programme.title: Family Time - The Help
programme.desc: Tony decides to hire an assistant, but Lisa is not happy with the attractive female candidates; Lisa insists Tony hire a male assistant.

programme.title: Family Time - Salt N Pepa N Spice
programme.desc: Lori hosts a charity event and calls on the girls from Salt-N-Pepa to perform; Lisa wants Tony to get a vasectomy.

programme.title: Family Time - Whats Ours Is Mine
programme.desc: Tony and Lisa go to couples counseling after arguing about a large purchase Tony made; Tonys father makes plans to come out of retirement and take over the business.

programme.title: Family Time - Troop Dad
programme.desc: Lisa agrees to host a baby shower but she finds herself overcome with shower plans; Tony is asked to take over as Ebonys troop leader.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - The Incredible Bulk
programme.desc: Bernie starts buying everything in bulk, including junk food; Wanda locks up the junk food in a shed.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Maid Man
programme.desc: Bernie urges the new maid (guest star Theresa Saldana) to treat the children as if they were her own.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Nut Job
programme.desc: Bernie enrolls the children in a myriad of activities, then discovers his Saturdays are at stake.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - The Other Sister
programme.desc: Bernies sister wants to help raise her niece and nephew but squabbles with her brother over parenting methods.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Meet the Grandparents
programme.desc: Wandas parents take over the household during their visit.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Uncle Steve
programme.desc: Steves (Steve Harvey) shy niece, Allison (guest star Megalyn Echikunwoke), is transformed by a make-over while visiting her uncle.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Working Homegirl
programme.desc: Lovitas (Terri J. Vaughn) feisty great-aunt (guest star Aloma Wright) comes to visit; Regina (Wendy Raquel Robinson) gives Romeo (Merlin Santana) the hall monitor job. With Steve Harvey, Lori Beth Denberg and William Lee Scott.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Strapped Tease
programme.desc: Lovita (Terri J. Vaughn) helps Steve and Cedric (Steve Harvey, Cedric the Entertainer) plan a bachelor party; Bullethead (William Lee Scott) falls for his Internet pen pal. Guest Star: Nikki Cox.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Nightmare on Steves Street
programme.desc: Unnatural events in Steves (Steve Harvey) apartment may keep him from the Funk Cafes grand opening. Guest star: Robin Yvette Allen.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Big Mouth on Campus
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) declines running for the Teacher of the Year award so Cedric (Cedric The Entertainer) can win.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Liar, Liar Your Versaces on Fire
programme.desc: Steve and Cedric (Steve Harvey, Cedric The Entertainer) test lie-detector bracelets with not-so-good results.

programme.title: Saving Westbrook High
programme.desc: Students, their parents and faculty face an uphill battle as they try to prevent their beloved school from closing due to budget cuts.

programme.title: Grandmas House
programme.desc: A young woman recounts how her life changed after she moved in with her grandmother.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Some Church Bull
programme.desc: In an effort to bring family members closer, Wanda insists they participate in the annual parish retreat.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Sorely Missed
programme.desc: When Bernie and Wanda find themselves spending all of their time with the kids, Bernie decides they need some time alone.
